assumptions: No real production metrics have been provided yet
The deck is intended for executive review
The current sample validates generation quality before brand-template fidelity

slides.title: AI Product Roadmap Review
slides.subtitle: 2026 H1 priorities and execution focus
slides.objective: Align leadership on goals, timing, and resource needs
speakerNotes: Open by framing the discussion around goals, sequencing, and resource requests.

slides.title: Agenda
slides.objective: Set the audience's mental model before the detail
speakerNotes: Keep the agenda brief and make clear that the deck ends with decision points.

slides.title: Context and goals
slides.objective: Explain why AI productization needs to accelerate now
bullets: Competition is shifting from point features to end-to-end workflow efficiency
Existing AI capabilities are fragmented and weakly differentiated in the product
The next two quarters should convert experimental AI features into stable product capability
The goal is to improve penetration, conversion, and delivery efficiency in core scenarios
speakerNotes: Keep the focus on business urgency rather than implementation detail.

slides.title: Current challenges
slides.objective: Separate product problems from operating-model constraints
left: Capabilities are spread across multiple modules and hard to discover
AI output quality is inconsistent and lacks a shared evaluation standard
Delivery still depends on repeated manual work
right: The monetization path is unclear and ROI is hard to prove
Cross-team execution depends too heavily on manual coordination
Feedback loops are weak and iteration is slower than it should be
speakerNotes: Use the left column for product issues and the right column for execution issues.

slides.title: Roadmap design
slides.objective: Show the roadmap in phases that are easy to understand
bullets: Align on core scenarios and success metrics
Consolidate the capability foundation and simplify the user experience
Launch priority scenarios and establish a feedback loop
Package the offer for repeatable commercial deployment
speakerNotes: Name the phases in business terms, not only technical terms.

slides.title: KPI placeholder
slides.objective: Reserve a clear place for real operating metrics
bullets: These are placeholder values used to validate chart generation
In production, track penetration, conversion, and usage frequency
speakerNotes: Replace the chart field directly when real operating metrics are available.

slides.title: Resources and risks
slides.objective: Clarify what decisions and dependencies matter most

rows: Focus on core scenarios and reduce parallel work
Add instrumentation and user feedback capture

speakerNotes: This slide should make the resource request feel justified and concrete.

slides.title: Conclusion and next steps
slides.subtitle: Once direction is confirmed, a detailed execution schedule can follow within two weeks
bullets: Confirm the top two AI scenarios to prioritize
Confirm the quarterly metric set and review cadence
speakerNotes: Bring the discussion back to decision items rather than opening new detail.
